string.title: Molang string
string.description: A simple Molang expression represented as a string.

versioned.title: Versioned Molang expression
versioned.description: Molang expressions can be either a simple string or an object with an expression and version.

expression.title: Molang expression
expression.description: Molang expressions can be either a string, a number, or an object with an expression and version.
